titleStmt.title: SII 26.9: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 9. (A.R. No. 9 of 1909.) POṈ-AMARĀVATI, TIRUMAYAM, TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple.

This incomplete inscription records the construction, at Poṉṉamarāpati in Puṟamalai-nāḍu, of the central shrine (Śrī-vimāna) and the installation in it of god Rājēndraśōḷīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva by Vīmaṉ (Bhīmaṉ) Rājēndraśōḻaṉ alias Nishadharājaṉ as well as the distribution of the days of worship amongst the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple.
Cf. Inscriptions (Texts) of the Pudukkottai State, No. 137.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhyaRead tribhuvaºnaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattonpatāvatu rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu rājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟamalaināṭṭup poṉṉamarāpati rājentracoḷiśvamuṭaiya mahādevarai tirupratiṣṭhaiyum paṇṇi śrī vimānamum Eḻun=taruḷivitta vīmaṉ rājentracoḻaṉā
ṉa niṣadharājar muṉpu civappirāmaṇarkku nīrvārttu tāṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttanāḷkaḷ piṉpu nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷil saṅharicca paricāvatu puṟamalaināṭṭuppaṭṭarukku nāḷāṟum Ivar makaṉāṇṭāṉukku nāḷ munṟum kunṟapaṭṭar pakkal Āṇṭāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nāḷ Onṟum Āka nāḷ pattu Innāḷ
pattilum puṟmalaināṭupaṭṭar civaprasādaṉūkku Āṅśamākak kuṭutta nāḷ muṉṟu kaṇṇabhaṭṭarkku nāḷ munṟu Ūr bhaṭṭaṉ nampikku nāḷ munṟu tillai nāyakabhaṭṭarkku nāḷ munṟu paṭṭāṇṭāṉukkum perumāḷukkum nāḷ munṟu kurampāṭāṉukku nāḷ munṟu vayyakkuṉippāṉukkum cuppiramaṇṇiyaṉukkum
nāḷ munṟu kuṉṟabhaṭṭarkku nāḷ munṟu Innāḷ munṟil Āṇṭāṉukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nāḷ Onṟu perumāḷukku śrīdhanam kuṭutta nāḷ Iraṇṭum Āka nāḷ muppatum Eṅkaḷil Ivvaṇṇam saṅhariccom Ivvaṉaivomum Āṇṭāṉ taṉperil kalveṭṭivacca caivācavariyamum Ikkoyilil teva taṉmamumIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
